# [Frontend Task Name]

## Description
[Detailed description of the Angular component or frontend logic to be implemented.]

## Parent Task

## Frontend Implementation Checklist
- [ ] HTML template structure implemented.
- [ ] Component styling (Tailwind/SCSS) matches the design.
- [ ] TypeScript logic and Service integration completed.
- [ ] Responsive behavior (mobile, tablet, desktop) handled.
- [ ] Form validations implemented (if applicable).
- [ ] Loading and Error states handled.

## API Dependencies
[Which backend endpoints does this component consume? Link to the API issue]

## Definition of Done
- [ ] The component is fully functional.
- [ ] Visual appearance matches the design specifications (Design approval: @fbarnabas55).
- [ ] Successfully integrated with parent components.
- [ ] Developer testing completed successfully.
- [ ] PM approval for final operation (@szczukabendeguz).
